arts.ttl: 'This is on a different scale' - New Everton Stadium feature has already sold out
arts.sum: The final bricks that will make up the emotional Everton Way at the club's new stadium have now been sold

arts.ttl: New Everton Stadium photos show final additions to pitch as historic first game nears
arts.sum: The new Everton Stadium is gearing up for its historic first game with the pitch markings and goal posts now in place

arts.ttl: Player says he’s having to engage brain more after Bournemouth exit – January transfer brings new tactics
arts.sum: Bournemouth sold Philip Billing in the January transfer window and the move caught many off guard. The midfielder is yet to make his debut for Napoli and it seems quite clear that he is only a squad player for Antonio Conte’s side, who are currently top of the table in Serie A. arts.ttl: Everton transfer truth emerges after Carlos Alcaraz deal as David Moyes Liverpool challenge clear
arts.sum: Our Everton jury have returned to have their say following the Premier League win over Leicester City

arts.ttl: Kevin Thelwell's challenge, PSR change - why Friedkin Group transformation of Everton can now begin
arts.sum: Everton's director of football Kevin Thelwell is out of contract in the summer. Whether his role is extended or not, the work behind-the-scenes over recent years means whoever is in charge will have a golden opportunity

arts.ttl: Greatest 'wind-up' celebrations in Premier League history: Emmanuel Adebayor gets his Arsenal revenge, Jamie Vardy's constant Tottenham jibes and the origin of Neal Maupay's beef with James Maddison
arts.sum: Thirty-three years worth of Premier League football has produced quite the catalogue of 'wind-up' celebrations, but, in truth, we are entering a golden age.

arts.ttl: Teacher taking on challenge so extraordinary Everton players couldn't believe it
arts.sum: Phill Hayward, a PE teacher at St Michael’s and All Angels and Our Lady of Pity, has just past 200 days of his gargantuan challenge and shows no signs of stopping

arts.ttl: David Moyes has rejuvenated ‘frustrating’ start to life at Everton for one Sean Dyche signing

arts.sum: Everton have won three on the spin heading into Saturday's welcome of Bournemouth, with David Moyes having the desired effect following his return to Goodison Park. Bournemouth saw their unbeaten run...

arts.ttl: What Everton reduced Ruud van Nistelrooy to vindicates Friedkin Group David Moyes decision
arts.sum: Everton's resurgence under David Moyes continued on Saturday against Leicester City at Goodison Park
